name: RABBIT-BACKLOG-2
title: rabbit-backlog skill bypasses Skill tool for rabbit-feature-scope — runs resolve-scope.sh directly via Bash
description: During backlog filing, the rabbit-backlog skill instructs the agent to 'invoke rabbit-feature-scope'. The agent skipped Skill('rabbit-feature-scope') and instead ran .claude/features/rabbit-feature-scope/scripts/resolve-scope.sh directly via the Bash tool, then dispatched a raw Agent call. This bypasses the skill indirection layer — skill updates to rabbit-feature-scope will not be picked up, and the contract between rabbit-backlog and rabbit-feature-scope is violated. The rabbit-backlog skill text should be explicit that invocation must go through the Skill tool, not direct script execution.
